name: value_quality_factor_probe
edge_thesis: Cheap plus high-quality stocks may outperform expensive plus low-quality stocks on a risk-adjusted basis, but only if tested with point-in-time fundamentals and survivorship-safe universe membership.

data_gate.reason: Current repository and execution environment do not provide both filing-date point-in-time fundamentals and delisted/survivorship-safe universe membership. IC evaluation is intentionally not run.

source_probe.point_in_time_fundamentals: feasible engineering path for filing-date aligned issuer facts
source_probe.survivorship_safe_universe: not sufficient by itself; requires ticker/CIK history, delistings, prices, shares, corporate actions, and universe membership history
source_probe.current_execution_result: network DNS blocked for data.sec.gov in this sandbox
snapshot/current-public-data paths only; rejected for no-lookahead value factor IC

source_probe.source: paid curated datasets such as Sharadar or SimFin
source_probe.point_in_time_fundamentals: potential acquisition path, subject to subscription/license verification
source_probe.survivorship_safe_universe: potential acquisition path if delisted coverage and PIT fields are included

next_data_paths: Build an EDGAR ingestion pipeline keyed by CIK/accession with filingDate acceptance alignment, XBRL tag normalization, restatement policy, ticker/CIK mapping history, delistings, corporate actions, and survivorship-safe price universe.
Acquire a licensed point-in-time fundamentals plus active/delisted equity prices dataset and verify filing-date fields before running IC.
Only after one path passes, run the locked factor set through Rank IC, ICIR, t-value, quintile monotonicity, Benjamini-Hochberg FDR, walk-forward OOS, full costs, and dual benchmarks.
disclaimer: Public-safe placeholder only. No factor IC, strategy registration, order path, or live trading change.
